description: Component files intentionally not assigned to a coverage-matrix surface, with a one-line reason per entry. The matrix validator allows these to skip the 'every component must appear somewhere' check. Use sparingly; the default expectation is that every UI surface lives in the matrix.

exempt.reason: Tiny presentational button covered indirectly by terminal-focus-shortcut.spec.ts
Catch-all boundary; runtime fallback not exercised by any specific user flow
Pure presentational; rendered as a child of WorkspaceSidebar entries
Toast presentation primitive; flows exercise it implicitly
Presentational primitive; covered indirectly by sidebar specs
